MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ciarin O'Sullivan for Eric Van Bezooijen (Contestant). Anne-Leith Matlock for Ernest Russell.

The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to May 23, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to try to wrap things up and try to resolve the issues.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguer/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
